title: T05 — Article 43 Conformity Assessment Decision
description: Binding Art. 43 conformity-assessment procedure selection, produced from art43_select (final mode) after Phase 1 verification. EU AI Act Art. 43.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit engagement.

procedure.description: Selected conformity assessment procedure: Annex VI (internal control), Annex VII (third-party notified body), or not applicable.

rationale.description: Human-readable rationale for the procedure selection referencing Art. 43 rule(s) applied.

binding_statement.description: Formal binding statement as it will appear in the final audit report (Art. 43).

preview_procedure.description: Preview Art. 43 decision from Stage A (may differ from final if declarations were corrected).

delta_from_preview.description: True if the final procedure differs from the preview. Triggers HITL declaration-mismatch flag (§8.4).

inputs.description: Snapshot of the inputs used by art43_select (final mode) for reproducibility.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artefact was generated.
